pitchEn: A fast arcade shoot-em-up where you pilot a plane, shoot down waves of enemies and survive 10 increasingly difficult levels. Fully offline single-player action.
newFeaturesEn: First release: 10 levels of arcade plane-shooting action with escalating difficulty and power-ups, playable fully offline.

dataHandling.notes: Fully offline game. No network, no hardware permissions, no accounts. Only local game settings/progress are kept on the device.

reviewerRemarksEn: No account, login or internet connection is needed. Launch the app, pick a language on first run, and tap Start to play. Control the plane to shoot enemies and progress through the 10 levels. Everything runs offline on the device.
